ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the participant */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Any pre-existing health conditions that might affect the experiment */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* Reference to the consent form signed by the participant */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact details for follow-up */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the participant was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the participant's record */,
  "experiment_condition" TEXT /* Condition to which the participant is assigned (e.g., control, treatment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus presented (e.g., image, sound) */,
  "response" INTEGER /* Participant's response (e.g., correct, incorrect) */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant */,
  "idx" INTEGER /* Index of the trial */,
  "ans" REAL /* Answer given by the participant */,
  "blc" REAL /* Base level of consciousness */,
  "imaginal_activation" REAL /* Imaginal activation */,
  "visual_activation" REAL /* Visual activation */,
  "stim" TEXT /* Stimulus presented */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the session in which the trial was conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the start of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the end of the trial */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the environment during the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "neural_data_file" TEXT /* Reference to the file containing neural data recordings */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data collected during the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trial record was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trial record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_stimulus_type FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_type") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, sound) */,
  "stimulus_image" TEXT /* Image data for the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the stimulus (e.g., natural, artificial) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stimulus (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the stimulus was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the stimulus record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the participant */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the start of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the end of the session */,
  "session_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the session (e.g., environment, equipment) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the session record was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the session record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the researcher was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the researcher's record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the principal investigator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the experiment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors (comma-separated) */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the experiment the publication is based on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the publication was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the publication record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
